response.justification: While Bogdan has solid 19 years of software engineering experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, the role requires recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products built at scale—neither clearly evident here. His background is that of a polyglot generalist craftsman rather than a strategic director-level specialist in cloud and AI platforms. The gap between Senior/Staff contributor and the principal-level strategic vision needed for this role is substantial.
strengths: Exceeds the 15-year experience requirement with ~19 years across diverse technical domains (backend, frontend, embedded, GIS)
Recent hands-on exposure to AI infrastructure through MCP and agentic workflows at current role shows current awareness
Demonstrated technical leadership through founding Northwind Labs open-source platform and creating community workshops and courses
concerns: No demonstrated recognized expertise in AI/ML—AI work appears limited to recent MCP exposure without evidence of built products or platform adoption
Generalist polyglot approach across many languages and domains, not the specialized cloud/AI platform expertise needed for director-level strategic role
No advanced degree in AI (Master's/PhD), and no clear evidence of advising customers/partners on AI technology adoption or driving disruptive innovation
